title: selaginella belangeri
intro: Selaginella belangeri, also known as the Spike Moss, is a species of evergreen flowering plant that belongs to the Selaginella genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Selaginella belangeri include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be applied topically to the skin for its soothing and protective effects.
